items.name: dependency-audit
items.title: Dependency Audit
items.description: Audit a project's dependencies for outdated and vulnerable packages and surface breaking-change notes for upgrades. Works with any ecosystem, including npm/pnpm/yarn, pip/Poetry/uv, Cargo, Go modules, Maven/Gradle, Bundler, Composer, and others. Use when checking a project's dependency health, planning upgrades, or responding to a vulnerability report.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
